title: Add source-backed backup restore readiness path
goal: Clear the restore blocker by adding a first-class restore dry-run endpoint/job with permission gates, audit evidence, validation query, and rollback plan metadata.
forbidden_scope: Do not run destructive restore commands against production resources.
Do not change existing backup plan/run contracts beyond adding the restore path.
Do not clear live provider/resource provisioning or production backup/rollback rehearsal blockers in this slice.
acceptance: POST /api/backups/runs/:runId/restore exists behind backup write policy with high risk for live restore.
Restore dry-run creates source-backed job evidence with source backup id, target environment, validation query, and rollback plan metadata.
Restore live execution remains blocked unless future approved execution policy is implemented.
Focused backup tests and diff hygiene pass with logs under /tmp/codex-tool-runs/svton/.
Board state records the restore blocker as cleared and keeps external provider/production rehearsal blockers.
summary: Added the first-class backup restore dry-run endpoint/job and cleared the restore implementation blocker.
